Standard Dimension Table Pads, 72"long x 23 ¼" wide.
1" or 2" thick.

  • Available in "Plus", larger size: 80"long x 30" wide.
  • 1" Comfort or 2" Firm Foam.
  • Pads can be used for imaging tables or stretchers.
  • Fabricated for durability and longevity.
  • Helps maintain complete control of the patient.
  • 3 Covering options, Economy Vinyl, Upholstery Vinyl and "Techno-Tuff" Vinyl.
  • Two brass eyelets in each end for hanging.
  • Soft and comfortable.
  • Cleans easy with mild cleaner or germicide.


    • NOTE: Table pads over 1¼" (32mm) thick for diagnostic imaging are NOT recommended.


    (Edge of pads may show up on some images.)

Techno-Aide's premium radiolucent table pads are the ultimate imaging solution. The superior foam interior is covered in either a durable, reinforced vinyl or our unique 4-way stretch comfort fabric. These exceptional table pads can be used on imaging tables or stretchers to provide added comfort and stability for patients.

All premium table pads feature deluxe, completely sealed and sewn boxed corners for a high-quality finish. Table pads are radiolucent and offer easy cleaning between patients with any mild cleaner or germicide.

Techno-Aide is proud to offer the largest selection of economy, standard and premium table pads on the market. Our table pads are available in specific sizes designed to fit virtually any x-ray table and meet nearly any imaging need!
Comfortable and durable fabric over a premium foam interior

  • Choose: reinforced vinyl or 4-way stretch comfort fabric.
  • Perfect for x-ray tables and stretchers.
  • Increases patient comfort and stability.
  • Premium boxed corners provide a superior finish and look.
  • Available in two standard sizes designed for virtually any application.
  • Radiolucent and cleanable surface!
